title: City Marathon
description: 10000 citizens gather in the streets this weekend for the annual city marathon.

title: Music Festival
description: A three-day outdoor music festival kicks off downtown. Thousands of attendees camp side by side.

title: School Sports Day
description: Every school in the city holds its annual sports day. Hundreds of children compete in close contact.

title: Christmas Market
description: The city's beloved Christmas market opens. Crowded stalls and shared food attract thousands daily.

title: City Parade
description: The annual cultural parade draws massive crowds lining the streets for hours.

title: Football Final
description: The local team reaches the national final. Fans pack the stadium and bars across the city.

title: University Exam Period
description: Thousands of stressed students crowd libraries, cafeterias and study halls around the clock.

title: Refugee Shelter Overcrowding
description: The city's main refugee shelter reports severe overcrowding. Staff are struggling to maintain hygiene.

title: Emergency Budget Meeting
description: The city council convenes an emergency meeting. Citizens demand funding for hospitals — but the budget is tight.

title: Election Campaign Rally
description: A mayoral candidate hosts a massive rally downtown. Thousands attend despite rising infection numbers.

title: City Lockdown Debate
description: The council must decide whether to shut down the entire city. Businesses, schools and citizens await the decision.

title: Press Conference
description: Journalists demand answers about the rising hospital admissions. The public is watching closely.

title: School Closure Debate
description: Parents and teachers clash at city hall over whether schools should close. Protests erupt outside.

title: Border Control Vote
description: The council votes on whether to restrict travel in and out of the city. Businesses push back hard.

title: Public Health Law
description: A controversial new health law requiring citizen data collection is up for vote. Privacy groups protest.

title: Opposition Leak
description: A leaked internal report suggesting the situation is worse than announced causes public panic.

title: Hospital at Capacity
description: The city hospital reports it can no longer admit new patients. Doctors work around the clock with no relief in sight.

title: Vaccination Campaign
description: The city launches a mass vaccination campaign. But supply is limited and queues stretch around the block.

title: Laboratory Contamination
description: The main research lab reports a contamination incident. All ongoing disease analysis must halt immediately.

title: Mystery Cluster
description: A new cluster of severely ill patients appears in the eastern district. No obvious connection between them has been found.

title: Medical Supply Shortage
description: Hospitals report critical shortages of masks, gloves and medicine. Emergency procurement is underway.

title: Ambulance Strike
description: Overworked ambulance staff go on strike. Emergency response times triple across the city.

title: Nursing Home Outbreak
description: A severe outbreak is reported at the city's largest nursing home. The most vulnerable citizens are at risk.

title: Field Hospital Setup
description: Authorities propose setting up a temporary field hospital in the city park. Residents nearby object loudly.
